title: OASIS DAY CENTER - 211info
text: NW GLISAN OASIS DAY CENTER OASIS DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a daytime outdoor drop-in center with seating (including covered areas, chairs, tables, and benches). Services include restrooms, showers, charging stations for personal electronics, Wi-Fi connection, a pet area, hot drinks, and snacks. Also provides participants with rotating mobile on-site services and private meeting areas. NW 6th Avenue and NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 6am-10pm Email (971) 269-0024 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 269-0024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Streetcar and TriMet Max green and yellow lines. Services: Homeless Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
